privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic data task with a citizen science wildlife observation dataset containing exactly 20 observations with a total observation count of 111. The data includes 3 different date formats (M/DD/YY, MM-DD-YYYY, Month DD YYYY) and 10 unique species names from an informal lookup table. Two entries have implausible counts (squirrel with 12 when max is 10, and deer with 50 when max is 5), representing 10% flagging rate. The task uses a reference table of 10 species with standardized names. Task has 180-second timeout, 20-step limit, and medium difficulty. No public dataset used - data is entirely synthetic.
